description: The Reference Spatial Variable Driver`1 component gets the closest reference value in the Spatial variables system and drives a field with it.

fields.VariableName: The variable name to sample for.
fields.DefaultTarget: The value to default to when no reference can be sampled.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a field to drive and a variable name. the slot this component is on acts as the position for sampling variable values.
